name: Critters Quest
author: Poki
description: Critters Quest is an animal adventure where you team up with your best furry friend. Choose a cat or dog to start your journey! Explore the world, battle wild creatures, and catch new critters to add to your squad. Each victory helps your animals level up, making your team stronger and stronger. Can you collect them all and become the ultimate beast trainer? How to play Critters Quest? Click or tap to make the choice. Use WASD, the arrow keys, or the joystick to move. Who created Critters Quest? Critters Quest is created by Critters Studio. Play their other games on Poki: Merge Zoo ! How can I play Critters Quest for free? You can play Critters Quest for free on Poki. Can I play Critters Quest on mobile devices and desktop? Critters Quest can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
